LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterFireDesc: Select a target or cell for the next acid shot. Right-click toggles automatic fire; manual shots remain available while it is disabled.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterManualTargetQueuedMes: Manual target queued for the next acid shot.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterFireDisabled: Firing is disabled. Right-click the command to enable it.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterInvalidTarget: That is not a valid target.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterRoofedTarget: The fleshmass spitter cannot fire at a roofed cell.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassSpitterCannotHitTarget: The target is outside the spitter's firing range.
